div.p: sizeof ≈ 8 Python object refs + list | Single-use per source string
Technical Summary ───────────────────────── • Complexity: O(n) Time, O(n) Space (tokens list) • Safety: start/current managed via _begin_token • Invariants: line/column updated ONLY in advance()
source type: str (immutable) invariant: never mutated after init
start / current start := current at _begin_token() invariant: 0 ≤ start ≤ current ≤ len(source) current: monotonically non-decreasing
line / column invariant: line ≥ 1, column ≥ 1 updater: advance() '\n' → line += 1; col := 1
advance() READS: source[current] WRITES: current (+1), line, col ⚠ Single Source of Truth for Pos
_begin_token() Snapshots current pos to start start := current token_start_line := line
